AddonSubscriptionId.description: The subscription ID associated to the instance.

AddonName.description: The name of the Add On provider associated to the subscription of the instance.

AddonInstanceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Add On instance.

CreatedTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when the Add On instance was created.

AddonName.description: The name of the Add On for the subscription.

CreatedTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when the Add On subscription was created.

AddressListId.description: The identifier of the address list resource.

AddressListArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the address list resource.

AddressListName.description: A user-friendly name for the address list resource.

CreatedTimestamp.description: The date of when then address list was created.

LastUpdatedTimestamp.description: The date of when the address list was last updated.

Name.description: A user-friendly name for the import job.

PreSignedUrl.description: The pre-signed URL target for uploading the input file.

ImportedItemsCount.description: The number of input addresses successfully imported into the address list.

FailedItemsCount.description: The number of input addresses that failed to be imported into the address list.

ImportDataFormat.description: The format of the input for an import job.

AddressListId.description: The unique identifier of the address list the import job was created for.

CreatedTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when the import job was created.

StartTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when the import job was started.

CompletedTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when the import job was completed.

Error.description: The reason for failure of an import job.

ArchiveName.description: The unique name assigned to the archive.

ArchiveArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the archive.

ArchiveState.description:
The current state of the archive:

  • ACTIVE – The archive is ready and available for use.

  • PENDING_DELETION – The archive has been marked for deletion and will be permanently deleted in 30 days. No further modifications can be made in this state.

Retention.description: The retention period for emails in this archive.

CreatedTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when the archive was created.

LastUpdatedTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when the archive was modified.

KmsKeyArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the KMS key used to encrypt the archive.

ArchiveId.description: The identifier of the archive the email export was performed from.

Filters.description: The criteria used to filter emails included in the export.

FromTimestamp.description: The start of the timestamp range the exported emails cover.

ToTimestamp.description: The end of the date range the exported emails cover.

MaxResults.description: The maximum number of email items included in the export.

ExportDestinationConfiguration.description: Where the exported emails are being delivered.

Status.description: The current status of the export job.

MessageDownloadLink.description: A pre-signed URL to temporarily download the full message content.

Envelope.description: The SMTP envelope information of the email.

Body.description: The textual body content of the email message.

ArchiveId.description: The identifier of the archive the email search was performed in.

Filters.description: The criteria used to filter emails included in the search.

FromTimestamp.description: The start timestamp of the range the searched emails cover.

ToTimestamp.description: The end timestamp of the range the searched emails cover.

MaxResults.description: The maximum number of search results to return.

Status.description: The current status of the search job.

Rows.description: The list of email result objects matching the search criteria.

IngressPointId.description: The identifier of an ingress endpoint resource.

IngressPointName.description: A user friendly name for the ingress endpoint.

IngressPointArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the ingress endpoint resource.

Status.description: The status of the ingress endpoint resource.

ARecord.description: The DNS A Record that identifies your ingress endpoint. Configure your DNS Mail Exchange (MX) record with this value to route emails to Mail Manager.

RuleSetId.description: The identifier of a rule set resource associated with the ingress endpoint.

TrafficPolicyId.description: The identifier of the traffic policy resource associated with the ingress endpoint.

IngressPointAuthConfiguration.description: The authentication configuration of the ingress endpoint resource.

NetworkConfiguration.description: The network configuration for the ingress point.

CreatedTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when the ingress endpoint was created.

LastUpdatedTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when the ingress endpoint was last updated.

Address.description: The address retrieved from the address list.

CreatedTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when the address was created.

RelayArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the relay.

Authentication.description: The authentication attribute—contains the secret ARN where the customer relay server credentials are stored.

CreatedTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when the relay was created.

LastModifiedTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when relay was last updated.

RuleSetId.description: The identifier of the rule set resource.

RuleSetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the rule set resource.

RuleSetName.description: A user-friendly name for the rule set resource.

CreatedDate.description: The date of when then rule set was created.

LastModificationDate.description: The date of when the rule set was last modified.

Rules.description: The rules contained in the rule set.

TrafficPolicyName.description: A user-friendly name for the traffic policy resource.

TrafficPolicyId.description: The identifier of the traffic policy resource.

TrafficPolicyArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the traffic policy resource.

PolicyStatements.description: The list of conditions which are in the traffic policy resource.

MaxMessageSizeBytes.description: The maximum message size in bytes of email which is allowed in by this traffic policy—anything larger will be blocked.

DefaultAction.description: The default action of the traffic policy.

CreatedTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when the traffic policy was created.

LastUpdatedTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when the traffic policy was last updated.

NextToken.description: If NextToken is returned, there are more results available. The value of NextToken is a unique pagination token for each page. Make the call again using the returned token to retrieve the next page.

Exports.description: The list of export job identifiers and statuses.

NextToken.description: If present, use to retrieve the next page of results.

Searches.description: The list of search job identifiers and statuses.

If NextToken is returned, there are more results available. The value of NextToken is a unique pagination token for each page. Make the call again using the returned token to retrieve the next page.

Tags.description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for the resource. For example, { "tags": {"key1":"value1", "key2":"value2"} }.
